[event]
# Switch 1
type=event
location=19,16,1,1
activate=on_trigger
cooldown=500ms
hotspot=location
mapmod_toggle=object,19,16,272,273;object,19,14,272,273;object,19,12,272,273
repeat=true
requires_not_tile=object,14,14,253
soundfx=soundfx/door_open.ogg
tooltip=Switch

[event]
# Switch 2
type=event
location=19,14,1,1
activate=on_trigger
cooldown=500ms
hotspot=location
mapmod_toggle=object,19,14,272,273;object,19,12,272,273
repeat=true
requires_not_tile=object,14,14,253
soundfx=soundfx/door_open.ogg
tooltip=Switch

[event]
# Switch 3
type=event
location=19,12,1,1
activate=on_trigger
cooldown=500ms
hotspot=location
mapmod_toggle=object,19,16,272,273;object,19,12,272,273
repeat=true
requires_not_tile=object,14,14,253
soundfx=soundfx/door_open.ogg
tooltip=Switch

[event]
# Puzzle Solved
type=event
location=13,14,1,1
activate=static
mapmod=object,14,14,253
repeat=false
requires_tile=object,19,16,273;object,19,14,273;object,19,12,273
soundfx=soundfx/powers/heal.ogg,0,0,false
spawn=il_skeleton_knight,15,14
spawn_level=hero_level,1.2

[event]
# Puzzle Loot
type=event
location=14,14,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=3,4
repeat=false
requires_tile=object,19,16,273;object,19,14,273;object,19,12,273
tooltip=Crypt

[event]
# Urn
type=event
location=14,16,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1
mapmod=object,14,16,269
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/inventory/inventory_object.ogg
tooltip=Urn

[event]
# Brazier sound effect
type=event
location=14,12,1,1
activate=on_load
soundfx=soundfx/environment/open_fire_loop.ogg

[enemy]
type=enemy
location=8,8,12,12
category=il_undead
number=4,5
spawn_level=hero_level,1
